title: Here's Range Rover's first not-SUV: The Range Rover GT
summary: The Range Rover GT will be the first vehicle from Jaguar Land Rover to use the new EMA flexible platform, which has been designed, like the MLA platform that underpins the Range Rover, to be powertrain-agnostic.
caption: output/2026-07-21/here-s-range-rover-s-first-not-suv-the-range-rover-gt.txt
